items.caption: Four logos for a restaurant and cafe. the top left logo reads "family dining room restaurant chain" with a stylized fork and spoon. adjacent to it, the top right logo is "restaurant fine dining" with a stylized "r" and "g". below these, the bottom left logo is "a.c.e. cafe coffee house" featuring a shield with a cup of coffee and a letter "e". the bottom right logo is "restaurant barbecue" with a stylized "r" and a barbecue grill. the logos are presented in a clean, modern font with a white background.
